wizard.subtitleLeague: Create leagues, assign teams and generate fixtures automatically
wizard.subtitleCup: Create cup, define groups and assign teams automatically

categoryAndLeagues.label: Category & Leagues
categoryAndLeagues.description: Select category and leagues to create

createLeagues.label: Create Leagues
createLeagues.description: Define leagues with all their rules

step0.title: Category & Leagues
step0.description: Select the category and leagues you want to create

leagues.label: Leagues to Create
leagues.description: Select the leagues you want to configure. You can choose from League A to League E.

summary.selectLeagues: Select at least one league to continue

errors.noLeagues: You must select at least one league

step1.title: Create Leagues
step1.description: Define the leagues and their complete rules. Fixtures will be generated in the next step.
step1.atLeastOne: There must be at least one league
step1.noActiveSeason: There is no active season to create the leagues

step2.title: Assign Teams
step2.description: Drag and drop teams into corresponding leagues
step2.errorLoading: Error loading teams. Please try again.

warnings.minTeams: Each league must have at least {{min}} teams
warnings.evenTeams: Each league must have an even number of teams

step3.title: Preview
step3.description: Review the configuration before generating fixtures

postSeason.title: Post-Season Management
postSeason.description: Generate and manage playoffs, playout, reducido and promotions
postSeason.noLeagues: No leagues in the active season
postSeason.waitingRegular: Waiting for regular season to finish
postSeason.readyToGenerate: Regular season is complete. You can generate the post-season.
postSeason.noPostSeasonConfigured: This league has no post-season configured

promotions.title: Inter-Division Promotions
promotions.description: Generate promotion matches between adjacent leagues
promotions.waitBoth: Both leagues must complete their post-season before generating promotions

cup.title: Create Cup

validation.minTeamsPerGroup: Must have at least 2 teams per group

sorteo.title: Group Draw
sorteo.noCoefData: No CoefKempes data. Default order: alphabetical.
sorteo.ruleOnePerPot: One team per pot in each group

editGroups.title: Edit Groups
editGroups.noMatchesPlayed: Can only edit if no matches have been played
editGroups.hasPlayedMatches: Cannot edit: matches have already been played

cup.groupsCompleteDesc: You can now generate the Gold Cup and Silver Cup
